subject: autoalign4warp issue in Matlab
body:
Dear Warp users, 
I have encountered an issue when using autoalign4warp in matlab, using the 
HIV
tutorial data set. 
The command is executed and starts but will fail after while at
''Analyzing and transferring files to worker ..." See error log attached.

According to the warning output I tried to attach the file to the pool, 
prior to executing with
>> addAttachedFiles(gcp, ['/opt/autoalign_dynamo/dautoalign4warp.m'])
but this did not help at all, unfortunately.


At this point I am not quite sure wether the issue lies within my dynamo 
installation or parallel pool settings from matlab, as the error log also 
states that files are missing in the generated alignments folder. 
Does someone have suggestions what I could try next on this?
Thanks a lot in advance!
best,
Alex





[image: error matlab.png]
